creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
(In reply to Francis GUDIN from comment #5)

You can use porttools if you don't have poudriere set up. For more info on some basic testing process, please see:

https://bitbucket.org/koobs/ports

Also, it'd be very nice if portlint didn't complain, especially not about missing mirrors. :)
